name: trace1
description: Small multi-turn conversational scenario exercising the pipeline's judgment paths: entity overlap across episodes (Priya, Northwind Labs, Marco), a fact stated then contradicted (Priya's employer changes in ep-3, which should invalidate the ep-0 employment edge), dedup judgment ("NYC" in ep-1 vs "New York City" in ep-2; "Priya" vs "Priya Raman"), possessive qualification ("Priya's dog Biscuit"), and unicode content (ep-4).

episodes.name: ep-0
episodes.content:
Marco: How's the new gig treating you?
Priya: I love it — I joined Northwind Labs in January as a data engineer. The commute from Queens is rough though.

episodes.name: ep-1
episodes.content:
Priya: Spent the weekend walking Biscuit around Prospect Park. My dog is obsessed with the long meadow.
Marco: Ha! I was in NYC too, caught a Knicks game with my brother.

episodes.name: ep-2
episodes.content:
Marco: Any chance you're free Thursday? There's a data engineering meetup in New York City, at the Flatiron Building.
Priya: Count me in. My teammate Sam Okafor from Northwind Labs is speaking there about stream processing.

episodes.name: ep-3
episodes.content:
Priya: Big news — I left Northwind Labs last Friday. I'm starting at Meridian Health next month as a senior data engineer.
Marco: Congrats, Priya Raman, moving up in the world! Does Sam know?

episodes.name: ep-4
episodes.content:
Priya: Started Japanese classes to prep for the Meridian Health office opening in Tokyo — my teacher 佐藤さん says my pronunciation is decent.
Marco: 頑張って! Biscuit can be your study buddy.

queries: What does Priya do on weekends?
